title: Thai Mustardy Quick Thai Curry Paella
description: A quick-fix, whole30-friendly Thai dish featuring a mustardy, gooey curry sauce served with a twist of traditional paella, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1/4 cup of coconut oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add 1 medium onion, diced, and cook until softened, 3 minutes.
Add 1 medium bell pepper, diced, and cook until tender, 5 minutes.
Add 2 tablespoons of Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add 2 tablespoons of fish sauce and 1 teaspoon of brown mustard and stir to combine.
Add 1 package of fish balls and cook until browned on all sides, 3-4 minutes.
Add 2 cups of chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in 1/4 cup of fresh cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
To serve, place a scoop of the curry sauce on top of a bed of iceberg lettuce and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
